comment: Bundle baseline. Updated 2026-05-13 after adding the `task` subagent tool slice. Delta vs prior baseline (2,824,383 B): +32,755 B. Adds src/agent/task/* (orchestrator, single-turn graph driver, tool-registry proxy, widget controller, terminal snapshot, run-id), src/tools/builtin/task.ts, src/prompts/{agent/taskSubagentPreamble, tools/builtin/taskDescription}, and src/ui/chat/blocks/Subagent{Live,Terminal}Block.tsx. Reuses existing graph/EventChannel/ConfirmationController surfaces — no new third-party deps. Cap reset to 30 KB for further incremental tuning.
